name: Giulia M.
text: An unforgettable dinner. The raw seafood was incredibly fresh and the sunset view from the terrace is breathtaking. We'll definitely be back!

name: Roberto P.
text: Finally a restaurant where the fish tastes like the real sea. The seafood spaghetti are the best I've ever had in Calabria.

name: Francesca & Davide
text: We celebrated our anniversary here. Impeccable service, refined dishes and an atmosphere that makes you feel at home. Chef Marco is a guarantee.

name: Alessandro T.
text: Brought by local friends, we didn't expect this much. The grilled octopus melted in your mouth and the homemade tiramisù is to die for. Authentic place, no frills.

name: Maria Luisa D.
text: We came back three times during our holiday. The fish soup is a masterpiece, the staff incredibly kind and the prices fair for the quality. Highly recommended!
